assertions.expectation: Explains that Extended channel provides up to 24 months of support vs 14 months for standard channels
assertions.reason: Response clearly states Extended channel provides 24-month support vs 14 months for Regular channel

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended channel has additional cost (it's not free)
assertions.reason: Response does not mention any cost implications or that Extended channel has additional costs

assertions.expectation: Notes that Extended channel gets the same versions as Regular but keeps them available longer
assertions.reason: Response mentions delayed features and limited version choices but doesn't clearly explain that Extended gets the same versions as Regular, just keeps them available longer

assertions.expectation: Warns that staying on older versions longer means missing new features and accumulating technical debt
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'Fewer new features: Latest Kubernetes features arrive much later' and discusses delayed ecosystem updates

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command to change the release channel to Extended
assertions.reason: Response provides the exact gcloud command: 'gcloud container clusters update CLUSTER_NAME --region=YOUR_REGION --release-channel=extended'

assertions.expectation: Advises checking that the current version (1.29) is available on Extended before switching
assertions.reason: Response specifically mentions checking if 1.29 is available on Extended and provides commands to check availability

assertions.expectation: Recommends Extended for environments with compliance requirements or slow internal change processes
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'Better for compliance: Longer validation periods for regulated environments' and discusses predictable upgrade cycles

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended doesn't mean you can skip upgrades forever — you still must upgrade within 24 months
assertions.reason: Response discusses upgrade cycles but doesn't explicitly state that upgrades are still mandatory within the 24-month window
